ci_support_linux_64_r_base4.4.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cran_mirror:
- https://cran.r-project.org
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  r-base:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
r_base:
- '4.4'
target_platform:
- linux-64

about.summary: Aggregates large single-cell data into metacell dataset by merging together gene expression of very similar cells. 'SuperCell' uses 'velocyto.R' <doi:10.1038/s41586-018-0414-6> <https://github.com/velocyto-team/velocyto.R> for RNA velocity and 'WeightedCluster' <doi:10.12682/lives.2296-1658.2013.24> <https://mephisto.unige.ch/weightedcluster/> for weighted clustering on metacells. We also recommend installing 'scater' Bioconductor package <doi:10.18129/B9.bioc.scater> <https://bioconductor.org/packages/release/bioc/html/scater.html>.

Aggregates large single-cell data into metacell dataset by merging together gene expression of very similar cells. 'SuperCell' uses 'velocyto.R' <doi:10.1038/s41586-018-0414-6> <https://github.com/velocyto-team/velocyto.R> for RNA velocity and 'WeightedCluster' <doi:10.12682/lives.2296-1658.2013.24> <https://mephisto.unige.ch/weightedcluster/> for weighted clustering on metacells. We also recommend installing 'scater' Bioconductor package <doi:10.18129/B9.bioc.scater> <https://bioconductor.org/packages/release/bioc/html/scater.html>.

name: r-supercell
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set version = '1.1' %}
{% set posix = 'm2-' if win else '' %}

package:
  name: r-supercell
  version: "{{ version|replace('-', '_') }}"

source:
  url:
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/SuperCell_{{ version }}.tar.gz
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/Archive/SuperCell/SuperCell_{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: f4dbad3ce11647295a702a000552bfcbe29a46d021efab65a0e188b098f132f3

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: generic
  rpaths:
    - lib/R/lib/
    - lib/
  missing_dso_whitelist:
    - '*/R.dll'        # [win]
    - '*/Rblas.dll'    # [win]
    - '*/Rlapack.dll'  # [win]

requirements:
  build:
    - {{ posix }}zip               # [win]
    - cross-r-base {{ r_base }}    # [build_platform != target_platform]
  host:
    - r-base
    - r-hmisc
    - r-matrix
    - r-rann
    - r-rtsne
    - r-corpcor
    - r-dbscan
    - r-entropy
    - r-ggplot2
    - r-igraph
    - r-irlba
    - r-matrixstats
    - r-patchwork
    - r-plotfunctions
    - r-plyr
    - r-proxy
    - r-rlang
    - r-scales
    - r-umap
    - r-weights
  run:
    - r-base
    - r-hmisc
    - r-matrix
    - r-rann
    - r-rtsne
    - r-corpcor
    - r-dbscan
    - r-entropy
    - r-ggplot2
    - r-igraph
    - r-irlba
    - r-matrixstats
    - r-patchwork
    - r-plotfunctions
    - r-plyr
    - r-proxy
    - r-rlang
    - r-scales
    - r-umap
    - r-weights

test:
  commands:
    - $R -e "library('SuperCell')"           # [not win]
    - "\"%R%\" -e \"library('SuperCell')\""  # [win]

about:
  home: https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=SuperCell
  license: GPL-3.0-only
  summary: Aggregates large single-cell data into metacell dataset by merging together gene expression
    of very similar cells. 'SuperCell' uses 'velocyto.R' <doi:10.1038/s41586-018-0414-6>
    <https://github.com/velocyto-team/velocyto.R> for RNA velocity and 'WeightedCluster'
    <doi:10.12682/lives.2296-1658.2013.24> <https://mephisto.unige.ch/weightedcluster/>
    for weighted clustering on metacells. We also recommend installing 'scater' Bioconductor
    package <doi:10.18129/B9.bioc.scater> <https://bioconductor.org/packages/release/bioc/html/scater.html>.
  license_family: GPL3
  license_file:
    - '{{ environ["PREFIX"] }}/lib/R/share/licenses/GPL-3'

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - conda-forge/r

# Package: SuperCell
# Type: Package
# biocViews: Software
# Title: Simplification of scRNA-Seq Data by Merging Together Similar Cells
# Version: 1.1
# Authors@R: c(person("Mariia","Bilous",role="aut",email = "mariia.bilous@unil.ch"),person("Matei","Teleman",role="cre",email = "matei.teleman@unil.ch"))
# Description: Aggregates large single-cell data into metacell dataset by merging together gene expression of very similar cells. 'SuperCell' uses 'velocyto.R' <doi:10.1038/s41586-018-0414-6> <https://github.com/velocyto-team/velocyto.R> for RNA velocity and 'WeightedCluster' <doi:10.12682/lives.2296-1658.2013.24> <https://mephisto.unige.ch/weightedcluster/> for weighted clustering on metacells. We also recommend installing 'scater' Bioconductor package <doi:10.18129/B9.bioc.scater> <https://bioconductor.org/packages/release/bioc/html/scater.html>.
# License: GPL-3
# BugReports: https://github.com/GfellerLab/SuperCell/issues
# Encoding: UTF-8
# LazyData: true
# LazyDataCompression: xz
# Additional_repositories: https://mteleman.github.io/drat2
# Imports: igraph, RANN, corpcor, weights, Hmisc, Matrix, matrixStats, plyr, irlba, grDevices, patchwork, ggplot2, umap, entropy, Rtsne, dbscan, scales, plotfunctions, proxy, methods, rlang,
# RoxygenNote: 7.3.3
# Suggests: SingleCellExperiment, SummarizedExperiment, cowplot, scater, Seurat, knitr, rmarkdown, remotes, bluster, velocyto.R, WeightedCluster, testthat (>= 3.0.0)
# Depends: R (>= 4.0.0)
# VignetteBuilder: knitr
# Config/testthat/edition: 3
# NeedsCompilation: no
# Packaged: 2025-12-16 10:49:45 UTC; admin
# Author: Mariia Bilous [aut], Matei Teleman [cre]
# Maintainer: Matei Teleman <matei.teleman@unil.ch>
# Repository: CRAN
# Date/Publication: 2025-12-16 12:20:07 UTC
